responsibility_vn: Quản lý sản phẩm AI Tuân thủ và các sản phẩm AI trong khối
responsibility_en: Manage AI Compliance product and all AI products across the group
primary_stakeholders: Internal AI product team, Giáp Lê, Huy Ngô (Product Director AI)
skill_domain: AI product management; alignment spec design
gap_level: low — direct match with TS compliance+AI PM experience

responsibility_vn: Quản lý sản phẩm tuân thủ đáp ứng mở rộng ra thị trường nước ngoài và đa ngành nghề
responsibility_en: Manage compliance products for international market expansion and multi-industry coverage
primary_stakeholders: International P&Ls, Legal/Compliance team, multi-industry stakeholders
skill_domain: International AI regulatory compliance; multi-market product adaptation
gap_level: medium — VN AI regulatory landscape and international standards are new domains

responsibility_vn: Phối hợp pháp chế bạn tuân thủ và PnL để bóc tách các yêu cầu tuân thủ theo thị trường
responsibility_en: Coordinate with Legal Compliance and P&L teams to decompose market-specific compliance requirements into product specifications
primary_stakeholders: Pháp chế (Legal), Bộ phận tuân thủ (Compliance), P&L team leads
skill_domain: Requirements decomposition; regulatory-to-spec translation; stakeholder alignment
gap_level: low — direct match with FDCPA/Reg F compliance-to-spec work at TS

responsibility_vn: Phối hợp Delivery team để release sản phẩm đúng thời hạn và chất lượng
responsibility_en: Coordinate with Delivery team to release products on time and to required quality standards
skill_domain: PM delivery coordination; milestone management; quality gate ownership
gap_level: low — core PM skill; 1.5× pace intensity is the gap (speed not skill)

responsibility_vn: Theo dõi giám sát nâng cấp hiệu năng sản phẩm
responsibility_en: Monitor supervise and upgrade product performance on an ongoing basis
primary_stakeholders: Internal AI product team; P&L clients
skill_domain: Product performance monitoring; AI system quality metrics; iteration planning
gap_level: medium — AI-specific performance metrics (LLM eval benchmarks; guardrail accuracy) are new but methodology is transferable
